reason: Verified agent can execute browser commands and retrieve page title containing "Example Domain" from https://example.com
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 — Application loaded successfully showing three agents in sidebar including "QA-20260404-221630-qvvs"
Clicked on "QA-20260404-221630-qvvs" agent in sidebar — Agent chat interface opened with message input field and "Browser Navigation and Page Title Check" session created
Typed message "Open a browser and go to https://example.com. Tell me the page title." in input field — Message entered successfully in textbox
Clicked send button — Message sent and agent began processing (status changed to "working")
Waited 10 seconds for response — Agent executed four tool calls: "Open Browser", "Page Snapshot", "Browser Command $ get title", and "Close Browser"

Verified response mentions "Example Domain" — Response text clearly states "The page title is Example Domain. It's a simple page with a "Learn more" link provided by IANA as an illustrative example domain." (completed in 12 seconds)
Took final screenshot showing complete response — Screenshot captured showing all tool calls with green checkmarks and the full response text mentioning "Example Domain"
